investigation_summary: Monsanto Papers: ghostwriting, "Let Nothing Go" strategy, regulatory undermining documented in Roundup discovery. $11B+ glyphosate settlements; 170k+ cases. PCB legacy: Superfund scale, Anniston settlement. Agent Orange manufacturer. Seed-system concentration; dicamba drift liability. Neonicotinoids & bees.

profile.tax_summary: German corp tax ~24–28%; Monsanto legacy offshore IP licensing; standard pharma/ag optimization.
profile.legal_summary: Roundup / glyphosate mass torts; Monsanto Papers conduct; PCB & Agent Orange legacy; dicamba drift verdicts; seed-market power; Essure and Xarelto settlements on pharma side.
profile.labor_summary: German HQ labor protections; farmworker glyphosate exposure documented.
profile.environmental_summary: Glyphosate IARC 2A; PCB persistence; GMO monoculture & superweeds; neonics.
profile.political_summary: Heavy US/EU lobbying; documented revolving door & IARC controversy.
profile.product_health: Roundup litigation; some Coppertone PFAS detections in third-party tests.
profile.executive_summary: Bayer market cap hit after $63B Monsanto deal.
